phase: RED tests for Pack 2 (budget repin + recall@10 floor)

ac_013_budget_repin.rationale: HITL-locked target post bit-KNN + f32 rerank (dev/plans/0.7.0-HITL-recommendations.md). Canonical-CI N=1M observed p50=2048 ms / p99=2327 ms on the f32-brute-force read path (dev/plans/runs/0.7.0-PERF-EXP-W4.1-ac013-canonical-output.json), so the new 80/300 budget is RED at canonical scale until P2-IMPL lands.

ac_013b_recall_test.fixture_reuse: seed_ac013_corpus + ac013_query_bodies (same corpus + held-out queries as AC-013)
ac_013b_recall_test.ground_truth_path: raw rusqlite::Connection on engine.path() running 'SELECT rowid FROM vector_default WHERE embedding MATCH vec_f32(?1) ORDER BY distance LIMIT 10' + canonical_nodes body lookup by write_cursor (mirrors lib.rs:2317-2342)

ac_013_dev_box_smoke_after_repin.note: dev-box smoke remains GREEN against the new 80/300 budget (8/13 << 80/300). RED expected at canonical N=1M per the cited W4.1 measurement.

recall_dev_box_smoke.note: Pre-Pack-2-IMPL the production read path is byte-equal to the ground-truth SQL, so recall = 1.0 at land time. Post-P2-IMPL the production path uses bit-KNN + f32 rerank and recall will measure top-10 preservation against the f32 ground truth.

preexisting_perf_tests.ac_013_vector_retrieval_latency: GREEN at dev-box smoke with new budget

canonical_red_evidence.verdict: RED at canonical scale — confirms the budget repin is a real gate, not a no-op

next_step_for_orchestrator: spawn codex reviewer on P2-RED, then advance to P2-IMPL
